title: Best Response Functions in a Two-Player Game
description: A diagram showing the best response functions of two players on a coordinate plane, illustrating the set of strategies that are optimal responses to the opponent's strategy.
relationships: BR1(s2) shows Player 1's optimal strategy for any given strategy of Player 2
BR2(s1) shows Player 2's optimal strategy for any given strategy of Player 1
The intersection point of BR1 and BR2 represents a Nash Equilibrium, where each player's strategy is a best response to the other's
